3313400.name: CS Diamantes Pipas FREE
3313400.description:
Welcome to CS Diamantes Pipas, an exciting adventure where every encounter with another PIPA is an exciting BATTLE for the conquest of airspace.

In this game you will have to control a KITE and CUT THE LINES of other players. The winner of the battle will depend on who has the best ANGLE, the best LINE and the best TECHNIQUE. Get ready to demonstrate your skills and become the king of the skies!

But being the king of the skies won't be easy, find the perfect combination of KITE and LINE to advance your career as a kite fighting master.

⚽ Player progress

▪️57 LEVELS: unlockable increasing experience.

▪️553 KITES: each type of KITE has unique speed and movements.

▪️214 LINES: LINES have attack, HP and recovery values for different types of attacks.

▪️25 BACKPACK LEVELS: increase the capacity of your backpack to carry more LINES and KITES.

▪️5 BAMBOO LEVELS: Earn more CUT KITES with the highest BAMBOO.

▪️13 SCENARIOS: Atmosphere, sound effects and optimization.

🔥Earn gold and experience

▪️Cut enemy KITES.

▪️TRIM: take KITES cut with your thread.

▪️Cut RABIOLAS enemies.

▪️Inspired mode: Consists of cutting a large number of enemy KITES which activates a bonus.

▪️Be among the first 1,2,3 in map RANK, line RANK and room RANK.

▪️Cutting powerful lines with a WEAK LINE gives a bonus.

▪️Breaking an enemy PIPA grants bonuses.

▪️DOBLE, TRIPLE, CUADRA, PENTA and HEXA bonuses.

🎮 Buttons to Control the PIPA

▪️DESCARREGAR: Carefully unload the line so that the kite turns and moves away.

▪️DESCARREGAR QUICKLY: Unload the line so that the kite moves away quickly.

▪️PUXAR: Choose the line to move the kite forward (use the smooth unload to turn in the desired direction)

▪️DISBICAR: Move the kite abruptly by pulling and moving the line.

🌐 RANKING (BONUS)

▪️Line Rank.

▪️Scenario Rank.

▪️TOP Room.

▪️RANK DIVISION Season.

▪️24/7 Online Tournament

▪️VIP Bonus +%95

▪️Exclusive KITES

▪️Exclusive LINES

▪️Exclusive characters

▪️much more.
3313400.supported_languages:
英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 印度尼西亚语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
